name: Rubitection
description: Rubitection is an AI-enabled medical device and care management platform focused on improving early detection and monitoring of chronic wounds, dermatologic conditions, and vascular health. By combining multi-sensor skin measurements with AI-driven image and data analysis, Rubitection helps clinicians identify risk earlier, personalize treatment, and reduce avoidable complications and costs across care settings--from hospitals to long-term and home care.
